claims.claim: Structural argument: Sacrificial bonding and energy dissipation require only reversible cross-links with characteristic bond energies in the 10-50 kJ/mol range and spatial density on nanometer scales—these are material properties, not protein-specific properties. Any macromolecule meeting these criteria provides equivalent toughening.
